description: Lash lands at Hive’s base and engages in a fierce fight, resisting Hive’s parasites and ultimately freeing Daisy from Hive’s control by purging her possession. The confrontation ends tragically as James attacks Lash, delivering a fatal blow. Daisy, newly freed, regains her agency and escapes in the Quinjet, heading home. This pivotal sequence resolves Daisy’s arc under Hive’s sway.

transcript.line: We're being attacked by... I don't know... some kind of a-a monster. You... You shouldn't. You've lost a lot of blood. I strongly advise against that.
He's on a beer run. I suggest we do the same. Or at least the... the running part.
